title: Hefite Fly Zapper Electric Indoor, 3500V Bug Catcher with 20W UV Light, Hangable Insect Killer with Safety Mesh, Fly Traps for Home, Bedroom, Office, Patio, Garden
bullet_points: Effective Elimination: Say goodbye to annoying buzzing and bites! This electric fly zapper features a 3500V high-voltage grid that instantly zaps mosquitoes, flies, and other pests upon contact. It’s the reliable solution for a peaceful, bug-free home, ideal for use in your bedroom and living room.

Non-Toxic & Safe: No more harmful chemicals or smelly sprays! Our fly killer indoor uses a bright 20W UV light to silently and effectively lure a wide range of flying insects. This non-toxic method is safe for families with kids and pets, making it perfect for continuous use day and night.

Flexible Placement: Enjoy total flexibility with this fly catcher for home use. Backed by a long 1.8m power cord, you can easily place it on a bedside table or hang it on a wall without being limited by outlet locations. This versatile design is ideal for patios, garages, and kitchens, allowing you to deploy protection exactly where needed.

Family & Pet Safety: Stop worrying about curious little fingers or paws! This family-friendly bug zapper is designed with a safe, outer protective grid. It effectively zaps bugs while preventing accidental contact, giving you peace of mind in any room, especially kids' bedrooms and pet-friendly spaces.

Easy to Clean: Forget about complicated cleanup! This insect killer features a removable bottom tray that collects all the insect remains. Simply detach and empty the tray for quick maintenance, ensuring your zapper operates at peak performance with minimal effort.
